title: polyscias balansae
intro: Polyscias balansae, also known as the Balansa's Polyscias or Black Coral, is a flowering plant species in the family Araliaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, due to its bioactive compounds like flavonoids and saponins. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Polyscias balansae can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
